text: Türkiye's Skydagger unveiled HUNTER, Türkiye's first interceptor (anti-drone) drone, now entering serial production. Fast (up to 320 km/h) and low-cost. Designed to ram and destroy enemy drones. Uses AI + thermal/day cameras for tracking. Purpose: Replace expensive missile-based air defense with a cheap, scalable drone hunter.

The US is deploying most of its long-range JASSM-ER stealth missiles for the Iran war, pulling them from global stockpiles. Only about 425 remain available worldwide out of 2,300 prewar. These missiles have been heavily used—over 1,000 in the first month—reducing reserves meant for other conflicts. Replacing them could take years. Source: Bloomberg

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 A friendly fire incident in the southern Lebanese village of Shebaa (Mount Dov area) has left a Maglan unit soldier dead and another seriously wounded. The force was operating under the 210th Division around 3am, attempting to arrest a alleged Hezbollah collaborator who had been passing information on IDF activities. A soldier spotted what he believed were fleeing suspects and opened fire according to protocol for “escapees”. The figures hit were fellow Maglan fighters. One was killed, the other seriously wounded. The intended target was captured. The IDF has opened a full investigation. @wfwitness
From the WFW team, we wish all those celebrating a peaceful and blessed Easter 🐣 . May this day bring you warmth, hope, and a quiet sense of renewal, wherever you are. @wfwitness

🇮🇷 Iran’s Army Statement No. 55: Iran Army, in the second phase of today’s drone operations, targeted: — US missile & combat drone detection radars — Aluminum industries in the UAE — US command HQ of mechanized, armored & helicopter battalions in Kuwait using Arash-2 drones. — Arab media report explosion sounds in Kuwait and the UAE. — The US uses UAE aluminum industries to produce weapons, including F-35 jets, missiles, tanks, and armored vehicles. — The strikes were carried out in retaliation for martyrs killed in US attacks on Iran’s industrial centers.

🇺🇸 🇨🇳 Chinese holdings of US Treasury securities have fallen to their lowest level since the 2008 financial crisis, dropping from a peak of ~$1.3 trillion in 2011 to roughly $650 billion today. As the US wages war in the Middle East and escalates tensions with Beijing, China continues quietly offloading American debt. The trend has accelerated sharply since 2022. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇮🇷 "I can claim: the Strait of Hormuz will never reopen." Oil and energy expert Behzad Ahmadi-Nia, speaking to BBC: "The Islamic Republic accomplished something impossible — closing the Strait of Hormuz. America had 24 hours to prevent it. At great cost — and it still didn't do it." According to Kpler and Tanker Tracker data: since the start of the war, Iran's oil exports have increased in volume and oil revenue has doubled while Kuwait, Iraq, Qatar, and the UAE have been unable to export a single barrel for over a month. "Iran's regional power has increased several times over. No one can easily joke about sanctions, economic pressure, or oil threats with Iran anymore." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Today, two U.S. HC-130J specialized aircraft arrived in the Middle East from Germany. These aircraft are expected to be used in the search-and-rescue operation for the remaining crew member of the downed F-15 in Iran. For the United States, locating and extracting the pilot is now critically important, both to avoid internal political pressure and to prevent the possibility of the pilot being used by Iran as leverage in a potential prisoner negotiation. It is expected that the U.S. may conduct another large-scale and high-risk insertion into Iranian territory in order to recover the downed pilot. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet

ELINT News RT @manniefabian : The IDF confirms bombing petrochemical facilities in southern Iran earlier today, saying the sites were used by the regime to manufacture materials for ballistic missiles. According to the military, the strikes led to a halt in all production of the chemical materials, and are also expected to cause billions of dollars in financial damage. Last week, The Times of Israel reported that Israel’s political leadership instructed the IDF to shift to striking “economic targets” in Iran, aimed at causing massive financial damage to the regime. Petrochemical facilities in southwest Iran were hit by Israeli airstrikes a short while ago, according to Iranian media. The Fars news agency reports that several facilities at the Mahshahr Petrochemical Special Zone in the Khuzestan Province were hit by strikes. The report says smoke is rising from the area and there may be casualties. - Emanuel (Mannie) Fabian tweet

🇮🇷 Ayatollah Ameli: "In history, three times women have taken the lead — surpassing the men." The first: at the burial of the martyrs of Karbala, when the men were afraid to step forward, the women came first. The second: in Kufa, when the captives were to be sent to Damascus, the women accompanied the caravan with dignity, led by Lady Zainab. "The third is in our time. The enemy is bewildered — a woman with bombs falling above her head, yet reciting epic poetry." He had just witnessed a mother who lost eight members of her family to martyrdom, still standing, still chanting. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
